languages.text: "Я обещаю потренироваться в этом искусстве, Вольный Торговец". {n}По тону капитана не ясно, серьезно она или нет.{/n} "Разрешите удалиться".
"I promise to practice this art, Rogue Trader." {n}From the captain's tone, it is unclear whether she is being serious.{/n} "May I be dismissed?"
languages.original_text: "Я обещаю потренироваться в этом искусстве, Вольный Торговец". {n}По тону капитана не ясно, серьезно она или нет.{/n} "Разрешите удалиться".

traits.locale_text: "I promise to practice that art, Rogue Trader." {n}From the captain's tone, it is unclear whether she is being serious.{/n} "May I be dismissed?"
"I promise to practice that art, Rogue Trader." {n}From the captain's tone, it is unclear whether she is being serious.{/n} "May I be dismissed?"
"I promise to practice this art, Rogue Trader." {n}From the captain's tone, it is unclear whether she is being serious.{/n} "May I be dismissed?"
"I promise to practice this art, Rogue Trader." {n}From the captain's tone, it is unclear whether she is being serious.{/n} "May I be dismissed?"

languages.text: "Ich verspreche, diese Kunst zu praktizieren, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}." {n}Dem Tonfall des Captains ist nicht zu entnehmen, ob sie es ernst meint.{/n} "Darf ich abtreten?"
languages.original_text: "I promise to practice this art, Rogue Trader." {n}From the captain's tone, it is unclear whether she is being serious.{/n} "May I be dismissed?"

traits.locale_text: "Ich verspreche, diese Kunst zu praktizieren, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. {n}Dem Tonfall des Captains ist nicht zu entnehmen, ob sie es ernst meint.{/n} "Darf ich abtreten?"

languages.text: « Je vous promets de m'améliorer dans ce domaine, libre-marchand. » {n}À en croire le ton de la capitaine, vous doutez du sérieux de sa déclaration.{/n} « M'autorisez-vous à prendre congé ? »
languages.original_text: "I promise to practice this art, Rogue Trader." {n}From the captain's tone, it is unclear whether she is being serious.{/n} "May I be dismissed?"

traits.locale_text: « Je vous promets de m'améliorer dans ce domaine, libre-marchand. » {n}À en croire le ton de la capitaine, vous doutez du sérieux de sa déclaration.{/n} « M'autorisez-vous à prendre congé ? »

languages.text: «Prometo esmerarme en esta práctica, Comerciante Independiente». {n}El tono de la capitana no te permite determinar si habla en serio.{/n} «¿Puedo retirarme?».
languages.original_text: "I promise to practice this art, Rogue Trader." {n}From the captain's tone, it is unclear whether she is being serious.{/n} "May I be dismissed?"

traits.locale_text: «Prometo esmerarme en esta práctica, Comerciante Independiente». {n}El tono de la capitana no te permite determinar si habla en serio.{/n} «¿Puedo retirarme?».

languages.text: "Bu sanat üzerinde çalışacağıma söz veriyorum Hür Tacir." {n}Yüzbaşı'nın ses tonundan ciddi olup olmadığı anlaşılmıyor.{/n} "İzninizle gidebilir miyim?"
languages.original_text: "I promise to practice this art, Rogue Trader." {n}From the captain's tone, it is unclear whether she is being serious.{/n} "May I be dismissed?"

traits.locale_text: "Bu sanat üzerinde çalışacağıma söz veriyorum Hür Tacir." {n}Yüzbaşı'nın ses tonundan ciddi olup olmadığı anlaşılmıyor.{/n} "İzninizle gidebilir miyim?"

languages.text: “我保证会勤修这门技艺，行商浪人。”{n}从上尉的口气中，很难判断她是不是认真的。{/n}“我可以退下了吗？”
languages.original_text: "I promise to practice this art, Rogue Trader." {n}From the captain's tone, it is unclear whether she is being serious.{/n} "May I be dismissed?"

traits.locale_text: “我保证会勤修这门技艺，行商浪人。”{n}从上尉的口气中，很难判断她是不是认真的。{/n}“我可以退下了吗？”

languages.text: 「この芸術を練習する事を約束します、ローグトレーダー。」{n}船長の口調から、本気かどうかは不明である。{/n}「失礼します。」
languages.original_text: "I promise to practice this art, Rogue Trader." {n}From the captain's tone, it is unclear whether she is being serious.{/n} "May I be dismissed?"

traits.locale_text: 「この芸術を練習する事を約束します、ローグトレーダー。」{n}船長の口調から、本気かどうかは不明である。{/n}「失礼します。」
